title: Dockerfile.build: using ubuntu 17.04
body:
ubuntu 16.04 have not package `libostree-dev`. also, we should
install `libglib2.0-dev` package when build skopeo with command `make binary`.

Signed-off-by: 0x0916 <w@laoqinren.net>

comments.body: @0x0916 Do you have a link where we can get skopeo for Ubuntu/Debian?
@rhatdan No, I have not.  I build the skopeo by myself in ubuntu 16.04.
Ok we have an effort to build cri-o, buildah and skopeo for debian/ubuntu packages. I was hoping that you had already done skopeo.  I will add this to our list.  @lsm5 FYI
@0x0916 could you please share the packaging code and/or upload the package to a PPA?
@lsm5 sorry, I have not written the packaging code/scripts
